  children={"Get Programs by Version Status and Version Type"}
>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/dropdown/program/versionStatus/{versionStatusIdList}/versionType/{versionTypeIdList}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a list of programs filtered on version status and version type

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"description":"The list of version status IDs for the program list","in":"path","name":"versionStatusIdList","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"description":"The list of version type IDs for the program list","in":"path","name":"versionTypeIdList","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>

  body={undefined}

  id={undefined}
